comment: X API recent search queries. Improve these based on result quality — swap out low-signal queries. Volume is uncapped (API max 100/query); cost control is done via since_id + seen-ID dedup in research/state.json, never by re-fetching.

queries.label: agents_workflows_en
queries.query: ("Claude Code" OR "AI agent" OR agentic) (tips OR workflow OR "how I" OR guide OR setup) -is:retweet -is:reply lang:en

queries.label: monetization_en
queries.query: ("AI agent" OR "with AI" OR ChatGPT OR Claude) (monetize OR "make money" OR MRR OR "paying customers") -is:retweet -is:reply lang:en

queries.label: ai_japan_ja
queries.query: (AIエージェント OR "Claude Code" OR 生成AI) (活用 OR 使い方 OR 収益化 OR マネタイズ OR 自動化) -is:retweet -is:reply lang:ja

queries.label: tools_updates_en
queries.query: (MCP OR "Claude Code" OR OpenAI OR Anthropic OR Gemini) (launched OR released OR announcing OR "new feature" OR update) -is:retweet -is:reply lang:en
